name: Cetylpyridinium
description: Cetylpyridinium is a quaternary ammonium with a broad-spectrum antiseptic properties. Its salt form, cetylpyridinium chloride, is found as an active ingredient in mouthwashes, toothpastes, lozenges, throat sprays, breath sprays, and nasal sprays. In dental hygiene products, it mediates a protective action against dental plaque and reducing gingivitis.
pharmacodynamics: It has a rapid bactericidal effect on gram-positive pathogens and a fungicide effect on yeasts [A24813].
